title: Fox Lamp
description: Now you can create a table lamp in the form of a cute sleeping fox
body:
**Now you can create a table lamp in the form of a cute sleeping fox**

![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f060e0271cca6c41841a26b4646e2ceb0dd777fa_0.webp)


**Turning the lamp on and off is done by right-clicking on it.**

![LampON](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cddcc795546f94442b4ab59eda03bda78ec49268_0.webp)

![LampOFF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94b7d5dd8b62f5ed32771b8d01c1ad70344bf052_0.webp)


**It also has a glass/translucent texture and looks good with shaders.**

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c110dc7e20027f54e886bae9ef3d18692fa9525.png)
